name: skill-eval
description: Evaluate any Claude Code skill on two layers: (1) static quality scoring derived from claude-code plugin conventions (frontmatter validity, body length, progressive disclosure, description triggerability) and (2) dynamic A/B benchmarking that runs the same prompts in parallel subagents with-skill vs without-skill and compares pass rate, time, and tokens. Produces a markdown report plus benchmark.json.
